_note: RETRIEVAL-PERFECT OVERLAY for the seed-decomposition harness run. One early-coverage article per gem, dated near its trigger, naming the ticker + catalyst in under-the-radar framing — i.e. the early piece GDELT structurally misses. Injected alongside the real GDELT pool so we can ask: does handing the firehose the early naming fix the 0% early-recall (=> retrieval was the wall), or does it still pick the wrong vehicle / skip (=> reasoning/vehicle-selection is the wall)? These are CONSTRUCTED from known catalysts (faithful, not individually web-verified — except BWET's, which are the real articles); they are a diagnostic device, not evidence. Dates sit within the early-recall window (~<=12wk after trigger). UPDATE: BWET now carries the real early article (2026-02-16) PLUS three constructed, url-less follow-on seeds (03-13/04-17/05-22) across its window, so the live/forward gem gets multi-week discovery chances (its tanker catalyst lacks the organic multi-week English GDELT coverage the historical gems get). Each follow-on is look-ahead-clean (references only the ongoing Hormuz/tanker thesis at its date).

articles.title: The under-the-radar pick-and-shovel winner of the ChatGPT boom
articles.snippet: Nvidia (NVDA) is emerging as the clearest beneficiary of the ChatGPT/AI wave as datacenter GPU demand surges; still under-owned versus the opportunity.

articles.title: A little-followed software name re-rates on AI
articles.snippet: Palantir (PLTR) unveiled its AIP platform; the under-followed software stock is re-rating as it proves real AI demand. Flying under the radar versus the chip names.

articles.title: This little-known server maker is an AI sleeper
articles.snippet: Super Micro (SMCI), an obscure server builder, is quietly surging on AI datacenter demand — barely covered despite the move.

articles.title: A tiny nuclear stock rides the AI power crunch
articles.snippet: NuScale Power (SMR), a small modular reactor play, is jumping on AI datacenter power demand and reactor approval news — still a micro-cap under the radar.

articles.title: The leveraged bitcoin proxy as spot ETFs launch
articles.snippet: MicroStrategy (MSTR) is becoming the de-facto leveraged bitcoin proxy as spot BTC ETFs launch and the halving nears.

articles.title: An under-the-radar telehealth name moves into weight-loss
articles.snippet: Hims & Hers (HIMS), a little-known telehealth provider, is launching GLP-1 weight-loss offerings; shares pop on a thesis few are watching yet.

articles.title: European arms makers rally as Ukraine war drives rearmament
articles.snippet: Rheinmetall (US ADR: RNMBY) is rallying as Europe rearms over the Ukraine war; US investors can access the defense leader via its ADR.

articles.title: One of the Top-Performing ETFs of 2026 So Far May Surprise You
articles.snippet: Investors seeking oil-freight futures exposure may be drawn to the Breakwave Tanker Shipping ETF (BWET), which has nearly doubled in the first weeks of the year as tanker rates climb.

articles.title: Tanker-freight ETN keeps climbing as Hormuz risk lifts rates
articles.snippet: The Breakwave Tanker Shipping ETF (BWET) keeps rising as Mideast tensions and Strait of Hormuz risk keep oil-freight (tanker) day-rates elevated — still a niche, under-owned freight-futures play.

articles.title: BWET extends run as tanker day-rates stay high on Gulf shipping risk
articles.snippet: Breakwave Tanker Shipping ETF (BWET) extends its advance as tanker day-rates stay elevated on persistent Gulf/Hormuz shipping risk; the freight-futures ETN is the purest pure-play vs diluted tanker operators.

articles.title: Freight-futures ETN BWET holds gains as tanker rates stay elevated
articles.snippet: BWET (Breakwave Tanker Shipping ETF) holds its gains as elevated tanker freight rates persist amid ongoing Hormuz tensions — the war-driven oil-freight spike has not resolved.

articles.title: The only US rare-earth miner soars as China curbs exports
articles.snippet: MP Materials (MP) is surging as China restricts rare-earth exports; MP is the lone scaled US producer, a direct reshoring/tariff beneficiary still under-owned.

articles.title: Argentine assets surge on Milei's reform-mandate win
articles.snippet: Argentine ADRs led by YPF jump after Javier Milei's election win promises sweeping reform; the state oil ADR (YPF) is the cleanest US-listed expression.

articles.title: Gold miners break out as bullion hits records
articles.snippet: The gold-miners ETF (GDX) is breaking out as bullion sets records on central-bank buying and rate-cut hopes — miners lag the metal and have room.

articles.title: Uranium quietly spikes on a deepening supply deficit
articles.snippet: The Global X Uranium ETF (URA) is climbing as spot uranium spikes on a structural supply deficit and a nuclear-renaissance restart cycle.
